app.name: Siete Academy
app.tagline: We train SDRs. We hire you.

home.heroPitch: Siete has sent 4.2M professional emails across LatAm and works with 180+ active B2B clients. Now we're training the next generation of SDRs in 8 weeks: on-demand content, live sessions with our AEs, team exercises, and a real exam in front of our commercial team. Those who pass get placed.
expectList: Live sessions at the end of each module
Practical exam in front of Siete

modules.d: How SaaS, agencies and marketplaces make money. Pricing, ACV, ARR, funding, the metrics your customer actually watches.
From the theoretical buyer persona to an actionable ICP. Real intent signals, exclusions that save you hours.
Multichannel cadences, discovery, qualification frameworks, objection handling, follow-up that doesn't annoy.
The tools we use daily. Your first recorded cold call reviewed by a Siete AE.

home.finalTagline: Think you have what it takes? Prove it.

apply.title: Apply to Siete Academy
apply.subtitle: Admission Stage 1. Three written questions and 26 multiple-choice. Instant result.
apply.name: Full name
apply.section02Intro: Each answer has a strict word range. Out of range → auto-reject.
apply.section03Intro: Read the base text above before answering the comprehension questions. Recommendation: don't go back.
apply.comprehensionTextTitle: Base text — read it before answering C.4
apply.video: Video URL (Loom / unlisted YouTube / public Drive)
apply.videoHint: Up to 4 minutes. Single take, no editing.
apply.submitReady: Ready to submit. You'll see Stage 1 result instantly.
apply.submitIncomplete: Complete all fields, the 3 written answers in range, and the 26 MCQs to enable submission.
apply.loadError: Could not load the test. Please refresh or contact us.
apply.resultPassedBody: Your written answers and MCQs cleared the floor. We'll review your video and let you know the next steps within seven days max.
apply.resultRejected: You don't move forward this time.
apply.resultPending: Your application is on our desk.
apply.resultPendingBody: We'll read every word, watch your video, and decide carefully. If we keep going, you'll receive an email with the next steps within seven days max.
apply.reason_rejected_text: One or more written answers fell outside the required word range. You can re-apply for a future cohort.
apply.reason_rejected_mcq_excel: The Excel & databases section floor is 40% (5 of 11). This test targets profiles with structured thinking over data. You can re-apply for a future cohort.
apply.reason_rejected_mcq_total: The MCQ floor is 60% (16 of 26). You can re-apply for a future cohort.
apply.reason_rejected_speed: You completed the test in under 15 minutes. It is designed to take ~70 minutes; less time signals random answers. You can re-apply for a future cohort.

student.title: My progress
student.noEnrollments: You are not enrolled in any cohort yet.
student.referSubtitle: Share Siete Academy with your network. Open the door for others too.
student.referralText: I'm training as an SDR at Siete Academy. If you know people hungry to sell, send them this:
student.stepLocked: Complete the previous step to unlock
student.stepNoContent: This lesson has no content for this step.
student.avatarPlayPrompt: Press play to listen to the AI coach
student.examFail: Below the {{passing}}% threshold. Review the content and retry next cohort.
student.slackSubtitle: Save this link — it's your fallback if you lose the welcome email.

calendar.title: Your program schedule
calendar.subtitle: Live sessions, module windows and recordings — all in one place.
calendar.empty: You don't have sessions scheduled yet. We'll notify you when your cohort opens.

account.title: Your profile
account.subtitle: Update how the rest of the program sees you.
account.name: Full name
account.photoHint: Paste the link to your photo. In prod we'll upload images directly.
account.emailHint: Your email is managed from your account (Google). It's not changed here.
account.passwordHint: Your password is managed from your Google account. If you need to change it, do it there and come back — no need to notify Siete.
account.communityHint: Direct link to your cohort's channel. Use it if you lost the welcome email.

teacher.feedbackPlaceholder: Be specific. Be honest. Help them improve.
teacher.attachmentHint: Upload to Drive/Dropbox/Loom and paste the link

teacherHome.title: Your program snapshot
teacherHome.subtitle: Who's progressing, who's stuck, how many deliveries are waiting. No fluff.
teacherHome.notePlaceholder: Targeted feedback, reminder, or link to extra material.
teacherHome.attachmentHint: Paste public link (Drive/Dropbox/Loom/YouTube). Student sees it in their Feedback tab.

admin.courseHint: Edit modules, lessons, videos and handbooks.
admin.cohortsHint: Create cohorts, open/close modules, adjust dates.
admin.practicaHint: Internal practice path (E1 → E2 → in-house T2 → T1).
admin.resultsHint: Grades per student × module × tier: micro-tests, module tests and the final test.

adminCourse.subtitle: Add videos, handbooks and resources. Reorder modules and lessons. Changes propagate to every cohort automatically.
adminCourse.noModules: This course has no modules yet.
adminCourse.youtubeHint: Only the ID (e.g. dQw4w9WgXcQ). If the lesson has a HeyGen MP4 per language, ignore this field.
adminCourse.videoUrlHint: Direct URL to the video with avatar + slides + audio baked in, for this language.
adminCourse.avatarHint: Only shown to students when there is NO HeyGen MP4. Useful for placeholders.
adminCourse.confirmDelete: Delete this lesson? This cannot be undone.
adminCourse.addLessonHint: The ES title is copied to EN/PT by default — edit afterwards.
adminCourse.resourcesEmpty: No support material yet. Paste links to slides, PDFs, papers or extra recordings.
adminCourse.resourceHint: Paste the public link (Drive/Dropbox/Loom). Reference material — doesn't count toward student progress.
adminCourse.assessmentsEmpty: No assessments yet. Create an MCQ, written deliverable, cold-call video, etc.
adminCourse.configHint: Depends on the type. MCQ needs questions + correct_answers. A written deliverable needs a prompt. Use the placeholder as guidance.
adminCourse.confirmDeleteAssessment: Delete this assessment? Past submissions are not erased.

postAcademy.title: Your path after graduation
postAcademy.intro: After graduating you have two paths: continue with Siete (Path A — E1 practice → E2 → in-house T2 → T1) or take the knowledge to another company (Path B — recommendation letter + alumni network). Here you see what stage you're at and what each step evaluates.
postAcademy.notInvitedBody: Stage 1 invitation depends on your overall grade ≥70%, Final Test ≥65%, cultural fit, and slot availability (max 6 simultaneous trainees). The Siete team invites formally up to 1 week post-graduation. Meanwhile, the full path is below.

library.title: B2B industries in LATAM
library.intro: Cross-cutting reference annex — support material, not graded. When prospecting an industry you don't know, start with its card before hitting the company website: it gives you the 20% of context that explains 80% of how it operates.
library.notFound: That industry is not in the library.

adminPractica.title: Post-Academy
adminPractica.inviteHint: Creates a candidate at stage e1_invited. Graduate must have overall grade ≥70% + Final Test ≥65% first.
adminPractica.terminalStage: Terminal stage — the candidate cannot transition further.

footer.tagline: Siete · B2B prospecting agency from LatAm
footer.motto: Built for people who actually sell.

certificate.title: Your certificate
certificate.empty: You don't have a certificate yet. Finish every module of your cohort.

recruiter.title: Available talent
recruiter.subtitle: Graduates cleared by Siete, ready to meet.
recruiter.interviewBody:
Hi {{name}},

I came across your profile through Siete Academy and I was really impressed with how you carried yourself and the results you showed during the program.

I'd love to schedule an interview to learn more about you. Are you available this week?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
